title.en: The god of the Sumeru realm hurriedly shouted.

content.en:
"Don't go over!"

The god of the Sumeru realm hurriedly shouted.

A high-level realm god said: "Sumeru realm god, such a treasure, why don't you go over, even if it is a little dangerous, there is hope to obtain it!"

The Sumeru Realm God sneered: "Remember, don't believe your own perception in the Death Void, we used to think it was a treasure, so a peak realm god passed, and ended up falling there! Not only can we not go over, we have to move away. "

I saw that the boundless sailboat continued to move along another path, and converged the light of the boundless sailboat, as if it was completely integrated into the void of death, and if you looked at it from a distance, you couldn't feel anything at all, so it was very safe.

These high-level peak realm gods thought that their strength was weak, but they didn't dare to go over there.

However, this is also because their strength is weak, if their strength reaches the peak realm of the gods, maybe they dare to go, and the gods of the Sumeru realm may not be able to stop them.

In short, there must be a mortal god who dies.

For the rest of the journey, the Boundless Sailing Ship 777 continued to advance, and the high-level realm gods saw many wonderful things and seemingly good treasures, but the Sumeru realm gods did not let any of the high-level realm gods pass.

Gradually, some high-level realm gods did not believe in the Sumeru realm gods, thinking that the Sumeru realm gods were deliberately exaggerating the danger, that is, they did not want them to snatch the treasures, so that the realm gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace would take the treasures later.

In the beginning, only a few high-level realm gods would have such an idea, but as time passed, there were more high-level realm gods who had this idea.

Finally this day.

As they passed through an area of the Death Void, those high-level realm gods saw crimson grass all over the void.

"It's the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass !!!"

The high-level realm gods were extremely excited.

There are so many such treasures.

The Red Sky Blood Golden Grass is a treasure that helps high-level realm gods condense the eternal realm spirit, which is equivalent to helping to break through the realm, for a high-level realm god, it can probably improve the realm by more than thirty percent, but only for the first time.

If it is used by high-level pinnacle realm gods to impact pinnacle realm gods, (affb) has a high probability of increasing the chance of breakthrough by one percent.

Even if there is only a 10% chance of breaking through, as long as there are enough high-level peak realm gods of a top force, such as the top force of Huoyang True Sect, there are many high-level peak realm gods, and if you take out ten Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, you will definitely be able to cultivate a peak realm god.

And there are not only ten such Red Sky Blood Golden Grasses, but hundreds of them.

Once, Taihao Tianzhu Palace auctioned a Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, and a top force almost exhausted the wealth that could be mobilized, so it was only then that the bid was made for this Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, but now there are so many of them.

For a moment, how could these high-level peak realm gods not be excited.

The point is, their current location is not far from these Red Sky Blood Golden Grass!

"Sumeru Realm God, this is the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, we should be fine one by one, right?" asked a high-level peak realm god.

But the god of the Sumeru realm said: "Don't go over, it's very dangerous there." "

At this time, the other high-level realm gods were not satisfied.

"Sumeru Realm God, don't you tell us that these are not the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, I have seen the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass before, and it is exactly the same in terms of breath and appearance. A high-level pinnacle realm god said.

The god of the Sumeru realm said helplessly: "These are indeed the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, but if there is no danger, will we keep them in the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace?" It is because it is too dangerous, we dare not take it, so we persuade you not to move." "

"Hehe, maybe you haven't been here before, who knows?"

A high-level realm god said.

For this high-level pinnacle realm god, as long as he grabbed some more Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, even if he didn't participate in this trip to the treasure land, it didn't matter.

He remembered the way he came, and when the time came, he would return.

The unknown treasure land can not be visited, but the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass must be taken.

Seeing a high-level peak realm god running over, the other high-level realm gods were about to move immediately.

Then. []

The Sumeru Realm God directly urged the Boundless Sailing Ship to form a layer of shield to prevent these high-level realm gods from going out.

"Sumeru Realm God, what are you doing here?"

These high-level realm gods were very annoyed.

If they can't defeat the gods of the Sumeru realm, otherwise they will definitely kill the gods of the Sumeru realm.

"You'll know just by looking at it!"

The Sumeru Realm God pointed to the high-level peak realm god who was the first to go out and said.

I saw that the high-level peak realm god had already come to the Chitian Blood Golden Grass, and when he was about to pick the Chitian Blood Golden Grass, a Chitian Blood Golden Grass moved, and I saw that it instantly slashed at the high-level peak realm god with a blade of grass, and the blade of grass contained terrifying superdimensional power.

In an instant, the high-level peak realm god was killed, and his body fell into the red sky blood golden grass, and was gradually devoured.

Seeing this scene, the other high-level realm gods trembled and were terrified.

If the gods of the Sumeru realm don't stop them, their fate is estimated to be the same.

At this time, the god of the Sumeru realm explained leisurely: "The Red Sky Blood Golden Grass that was auctioned at the beginning was the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass that erased the spiritual intelligence, but in fact, the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass was a semi-extradimensional plant life. And the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass in the middle of this place has completed the extradimensional evolution, it is a real extradimensional life, and it has been a superdimensional life for a long time. Once, all the peak realm gods of our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace joined forces, but they couldn't beat this Red Sky Blood Golden Grass. Fortunately, the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, a plant-based super-dimensional life, will not leave, so we are relatively safe. "

Ye Tian looked at the Sumeru Realm God, he knew very well that just now the Sumeru Realm God obviously had time to stop the high-level peak realm god from going out, but he didn't stop it, and after the other party went out, he stopped the other high-level realm gods.

Obviously, the Sumeru Realm God wanted to use the fall of this high-level peak realm god to warn other high-level realm gods not to run around in the Death Void.

No matter how you describe it, it is not as shocking as what you have witnessed, and it is real.

Only in this way would these high-level realm gods believe.

However, many high-level realm gods were already scared at the moment.

It's just incredibly dangerous along the way, but what about that treasure land?

Even if they can't touch extradimensional creatures, the slightest danger could kill them!

But they've already come here, even if they want to go back, the gods of the Sumeru realm won't allow it.
